user_story: As a System admin, I want to enable the calendar module, so that calendar functionality becomes available to the organization
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Calendar Setup screen; When I select Yes for "Do you want to enable the calendar module?" and click Save; Then the calendar module is enabled

user_story: As a System admin, I want to disable the calendar module, so that calendar features are turned off when not needed
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Calendar Setup screen; When I select No for enabling the calendar module and click Save; Then the calendar module is disabled

user_story: As a System admin, I want to save and proceed to the next configuration step, so that I can continue setting up the calendar in sequence
acceptance_criteria: Given I have chosen a calendar module option; When I click Save & Next; Then my selection is saved and I advance to the Configure Calendar step

user_story: As a System admin, I want to cancel my changes on the Setup screen, so that I can discard unintended edits
acceptance_criteria: Given I have made changes on the Setup screen; When I click Cancel; Then my unsaved changes are discarded
